n_sessions_early: Number of class sessions attended in early period
total_dur_early: Total time spent in class during early sessions (minutes)
mean_dur_early: Average session duration in early period (minutes)
n_code_early: Total code actions (save+submit) in early sessions
n_active_early: Active learning actions (code submit+quiz) in early sessions
n_total_events_early: Total number of all actions in early sessions
n_codesubmit_early: Code submissions for grading in early sessions
n_raisehand_early: Times student raised hand in early sessions
attend_frac_early: Fraction of expected early sessions actually attended
code_step_ratio_early: Ratio of code actions to slide navigation
active_frac_early: Fraction of actions that are active learning
action_diversity_early: Number of distinct action types used
